parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: $json.status === 'COMPLETE' ? 'completed' : ($json.status === 'FAILED' ? 'failed' : 'running'), total_products: $json.total, created_products: $json.created, updated_products: $json.updated, error_count: $json.error_count, details: { import_id: $json.import_id, raw_status: $json.raw_status, errors: $json.errors.slice(0, 50) }, completed_at: ['COMPLETE','FAILED'].includes($json.status) ? new Date().toISOString() : null }) }}
